title: astragalus collinus
intro: Astragalus collinus, also known as the alpine milk-vetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus collinus has been associated with various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and antioxidant properties that may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Astragalus collinus can be found in the form of capsules, tablets, or tea, and are often used to support the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
intro_study: According to "Natural product research", Astragalus collinus benefits include significant anti-inflammatory and anticancer properties, among others.
